sections.text: About Hostel

The Hostel is founded in 1984 to accommodate the boys, who come from different parts of the world. The hostel now has three blocks accommodating about 510 boarders. The rooms are well furnished and the surroundings of hostel is very green and pleasant, which encourages the students to study during late nights. The students who stayed in the hostel have secured 18 university ranks right from the inception of the hostel. The hostel is having two dinning halls of North & South Indian to cater the needs of the boarders for their taste.
Hostel is known for its discipline and well managed by dedicated faculty & staff members. The Hostel area is spacious as much as 4.5 acres, built up area it self being 12,877.09 Sq feet
Facilities & Amenities

items: Three Color TVs sets for entertainment & Information
Indoor Games: 'EKALAVYA' Indoor games hall for Shuttle, Badminton, T.T, Carom & chess.
Reading room with Kannada & English newspapers, periodicals & Magazine
Solar hot water for each blocks & Kitchens Geezer Hot Water

sections.text: The Hostel was started in 2008 to accommodate BIET girl students, who come from different parts of the world. The hostel now has one block with 4 Floors, accommodating about 320 boarders. The rooms are well furnished and the surroundings of hostel is very green and pleasant, which encourages the students to study.
North Indian & south Indian dishes are prepared in the hostel mess. The hostel mess is managed by the hostel administration itself. Ragging is totally prohibited in the hostel.

items: Designed to cater to 1000 students & staff

sections.text: 1000 students & staff not only eat but exchange views food is steam cooked and hygienic serving
The college canteen is designed to cater to 1000 students & staff. The college canteen is a place where students congregate to not only eat but exchange views.

items: All the department laboratories have first-aid kits
Biomedical Engineering department has facility to measure blood pressure, body temperature, heart rate, oxygen saturation, ECG, eye & ear testing

sections.text: Edusat is a satellite based distance learning programme. Our institution is having this facility in Information Science Dept seminar hall. In this programme the students can listen to lecturers from experts related to their subjects.

items: Student can interact with subject experts

sections.text: Our Institution provides Language lab facility to enhance the communication skills of the students. Today’s world requires a student who is in good in English.

sections.text: Ladies Room-B001 is located in the Biotechnology Block. The facility provides a comfortable space for students with proper seating arrangements and resting area.
The Silver-Line Guest House provides comfortable accommodation for visitors, guests and faculty. It is well furnished with modern amenities and a peaceful environment.
